Output:
   1: # OpenMnemo 创造资产内核实现级契约 v1
   2: > 日期：2026-03-24
   3: > 目标绑定：`goal_v003_20260324.md`
   4: > 相关规划稿：
   5: > - `Memory/04_knowledge/创造资产内核对象模型_2026-03-24.md`
   6: > - `Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md`
   7: > 代码现实参考：
   8: > - `packages/types/src/memory.ts`
   9: > - `packages/core/src/memory/data-layer-api.ts`
  10: > - `packages/core/src/memory/local-runtime.ts`
  11: > - `packages/core/src/memory/extraction.ts`
  12: 
  13: ---
  14: 
  15: ## 1. 这份契约要解决什么
  16: 
  17: 这份文档不是再讨论“方向对不对”，而是把当前已经确认的方向压成一份可编码的 contract。
  18: 
  19: 目标只有四个：
  20: 
  21: - 不推翻当前 `DataLayerAPI`
  22: - 把三类资产模型压成正式字段与接口
  23: - 把记忆树压成正式节点 schema
  24: - 把 Git/Gitea、FTS、vector、graph、runtime API 的职责边界钉死
  25: 
  26: 这意味着本轮的实现原则是：
  27: 
  28: - 先做 `projection layer`
  29: - 不直接把当前运行时 kind 全部改名
  30: - 不把 Git commit 树硬当运行时记忆树
  31: - 不让新资产层和旧数据层平行失控
  32: 
  33: ---
  34: 
  35: ## 2. 四层运行时分工
  36: 
  37: OpenMnemo 当前和下一阶段，应明确分成四层：
  38: 
  39: ### 2.1 Evidence Layer：事实层
  40: 
  41: 事实层只存原始证据与版本事实。
  42: 
  43: 包含：
  44: 
  45: - 原始 transcript
  46: - clean transcript
  47: - repo 文件
  48: - Git commit 历史
  49: - workflow 运行产物
  50: - import manifest
  51: 
  52: 这一层的原则：
  53: 
  54: - 是最终证据源
  55: - 可被版本化
  56: - 可被回溯
  57: - 不因为压缩而丢失
  58: 
  59: ### 2.2 Index Layer：索引层
  60: 
  61: 索引层负责快，不负责成为唯一事实源。
  62: 
  63: 包含：
  64: 
  65: - `index/search.sqlite`
  66: - FTS 候选索引
  67: - vector recall 索引
  68: - graph 索引
  69: - extraction bundle 的索引入口
  70: 
  71: 这一层的原则：
  72: 
  73: - 可以重建
  74: - 允许局部失效后再生成
  75: - 不能成为唯一真相
  76: 
  77: ### 2.3 Projection Layer：投影层
  78: 
  79: 投影层负责把事实层和索引层组织成：
  80: 
  81: - `TreeNodeRecord`
  82: - `ProductAssetRecord`
  83: - `MemoryAssetRecord`
  84: - `SkillAssetRecord`
  85: 
  86: 这一层是本轮新增的核心。
  87: 
  88: 它的职责：
  89: 
  90: - 形成导航结构
  91: - 形成资产结构
  92: - 形成跨层关系
  93: - 承接 probe runtime
  94: 
  95: ### 2.4 Interface Layer：接口层
  96: 
  97: 接口层分两层：
  98: 
  99: - `DataLayerAPI`
 100:   - 继续暴露当前 `session / memory_unit / source_asset / archive_anchor / mixed`
 101: - `AssetLayerAPI`
 102:   - 新增在其上的资产与记忆树运行时接口
 103: 
 104: 结论：
 105: 
 106: **`DataLayerAPI` 保持稳定，`AssetLayerAPI` 作为其上的实现级投影层出现。**
 107: 
 108: ---
 109: 
 110: ## 3. 规范化身份与根引用
 111: 
 112: ### 3.1 RootKind
 113: 
 114: ```ts
 115: type RootKind = 'session' | 'repo' | 'scope'
 116: ```
 117: 
 118: ### 3.2 内部 RootRefRecord
 119: 
 120: public tool 输入阶段可以继续把 `root_ref` 当字符串传入，但运行时内部应统一解析为：
 121: 
 122: ```ts
 123: interface RootRefRecord {
 124:   root_kind: RootKind
 125:   root_id: string
 126:   project?: string
 127:   scope_id?: string
 128: }
 129: ```
 130: 
 131: 规范：
 132: 
 133: - `session` 根对应一个会话容器
 134: - `repo` 根对应一个仓库容器
 135: - `scope` 根对应一个视图容器，而不是物理 repo 副本
 136: 
 137: ### 3.3 ID 规范
 138: 
 139: 所有投影对象都必须用显式前缀命名，避免和现有 `memory_unit:* / source_asset:* / archive_anchor:*` 混淆。
 140: 
 141: 建议前缀：
 142: 
 143: - `tree_node:`
 144: - `product_asset:`
 145: - `memory_asset:`
 146: - `skill_asset:`
 147: - `asset_edge:`
 148: 
 149: 同一对象在所有索引层和图层中必须保持同一个 ID。
 150: 
 151: ---
 152: 
 153: ## 4. TreeNodeRecord：导航节点正式契约
 154: 
 155: 实现层不要直接把每个树节点都等同于资产对象。
 156: 
 157: 建议：
 158: 
 159: - `TreeNodeRecord` 负责导航
 160: - `AssetRecord` 负责长期复用对象
 161: - 二者通过 `asset_id` 或 `derived_asset_ids` 连接
 162: 
 163: ### 4.1 TreeNodeType
 164: 
 165: ```ts
 166: type TreeNodeType =
 167:   | 'conversation_leaf'
 168:   | 'archive_batch'
 169:   | 'session_milestone'
 170:   | 'session_stage'
 171:   | 'repo_stage'
 172:   | 'workstream'
 173:   | 'repo_milestone'
 174:   | 'product_leaf'
 175:   | 'skill_leaf'
 176:   | 'scope_mount'
 177:   | 'global_milestone'
 178: ```
 179: 
 180: ### 4.2 TreeNodeRecord
 181: 
 182: ```ts
 183: type TreeNodeStatus = 'active' | 'superseded' | 'archived'
 184: type PrivacyLevel = 'private' | 'project' | 'shared' | 'public'
 185: 
 186: interface TreeNodeRecord {
 187:   id: string
 188:   root_kind: RootKind
 189:   root_id: string
 190:   project: string
 191:   scope_id?: string
 192:   node_type: TreeNodeType
 193:   parent_id?: string
 194:   child_ids: string[]
 195:   asset_id?: string
 196:   derived_asset_ids?: string[]
 197:   title: string
 198:   summary: string
 199:   anchor_text?: string
 200:   keywords: string[]
 201:   evidence_refs: string[]
 202:   raw_refs: string[]
 203:   related_node_ids: string[]
 204:   related_asset_ids: string[]
 205:   branch_key?: string
 206:   rank?: number
 207:   budget_weight?: number
 208:   privacy_level: PrivacyLevel
 209:   status: TreeNodeStatus
 210:   created_at: string
 211:   updated_at: string
 212: }
 213: ```
 214: 
 215: ### 4.3 节点生成规则
 216: 
 217: - `conversation_leaf`
 218:   - 优先由 `memory_unit` 投影生成
 219: - `archive_batch`
 220:   - 由一组相邻 `conversation_leaf` 收敛生成
 221: - `session_milestone`
 222:   - 由多个 `archive_batch` 与关键决策提炼生成
 223: - `session_stage`
 224:   - 由多个 `session_milestone` 串成主线
 225: - `workstream`
 226:   - 由 repo 范围内同类 session milestone、commit context、artifact cluster 聚合生成
 227: - `repo_milestone`
 228:   - 由 repo 阶段性结果、约束、决策聚合生成
 229: - `scope_mount`
 230:   - 只表达 repo 与 scope 的挂载关系，不挂 raw
 231: 
 232: ### 4.4 节点与预算的关系
 233: 
 234: 每个节点必须有 `budget_weight` 或可被计算出预算权重，用于：
 235: 
 236: - 小窗口模型优先停在主线
 237: - 大窗口模型允许展开 branch
 238: - raw hydration 时控制注入比例
 239: 
 240: ---
 241: 
 242: ## 5. BaseAssetRecord：三类资产共享正式字段
 243: 
 244: 本轮不再停留在“建议字段”，而采用共享字段分组。
 245: 
 246: ### 5.1 共享基础字段
 247: 
 248: ```ts
 249: type AssetType = 'product' | 'memory' | 'skill'
 250: type AssetStatus = 'draft' | 'active' | 'superseded' | 'archived'
 251: 
 252: interface BaseAssetRecord {
 253:   id: string
 254:   asset_type: AssetType
 255:   project: string
 256:   scope_id: string
 257:   title: string
 258:   summary: string
 259:   status: AssetStatus
 260:   privacy_level: PrivacyLevel
 261:   created_at: string
 262:   updated_at: string
 263: }
 264: ```
 265: 
 266: ### 5.2 共享索引字段
 267: 
 268: ```ts
 269: interface BaseAssetIndexFields {
 270:   tags: string[]
 271:   keywords: string[]
 272:   search_text: string
 273:   embedding_text: string
 274: }
 275: ```
 276: 
 277: ### 5.3 共享关系字段
 278: 
 279: ```ts
 280: interface BaseAssetRelationFields {
 281:   source_refs: string[]
 282:   session_refs: string[]
 283:   commit_refs: string[]
 284:   evidence_refs: string[]
 285:   related_asset_ids: string[]
 286:   related_node_ids: string[]
 287: }
 288: ```
 289: 
 290: ### 5.4 共享版本字段
 291: 
 292: ```ts
 293: interface BaseAssetVersionFields {
 294:   version: number
 295:   lineage: string[]
 296:   supersedes: string[]
 297:   snapshot_at?: string
 298: }
 299: ```
 300: 
 301: ### 5.5 实现层统一组合
 302: 
 303: ```ts
 304: type AssetRecord =
 305:   BaseAssetRecord
 306:   & BaseAssetIndexFields
 307:   & BaseAssetRelationFields
 308:   & BaseAssetVersionFields
 309: ```
 310: 
 311: ---
 312: 
 313: ## 6. 三类资产正式契约
 314: 
 315: ### 6.1 ProductAssetRecord
 316: 
 317: ```ts
 318: interface ProductAssetRecord extends AssetRecord {
 319:   asset_type: 'product'
 320:   product_kind:
 321:     | 'file'
 322:     | 'module'
 323:     | 'api'
 324:     | 'document'
 325:     | 'config'
 326:     | 'dataset'
 327:     | 'release'
 328:     | 'workflow_artifact'
 329:   repo_uri?: string
 330:   repo_path?: string
 331:   branch?: string
 332:   commit_range?: string[]
 333:   artifact_format?: string
 334:   owner_module?: string
 335:   build_state?: 'unknown' | 'draft' | 'ready' | 'released'
 336: }
 337: ```
 338: 
 339: ### 6.2 MemoryAssetRecord
 340: 
 341: ```ts
 342: interface MemoryAssetRecord extends AssetRecord {
 343:   asset_type: 'memory'
 344:   memory_kind:
 345:     | 'problem'
 346:     | 'decision'
 347:     | 'constraint'
 348:     | 'preference'
 349:     | 'attempt'
 350:     | 'failure'
 351:     | 'insight'
 352:     | 'milestone'
 353:   root_kind: RootKind
 354:   root_id: string
 355:   node_ref?: string
 356:   anchor_text?: string
 357:   raw_refs: string[]
 358:   parent_memory_id?: string
 359:   child_memory_ids: string[]
 360:   branch_key?: string
 361:   probe_policy?: 'main_only' | 'branch_first' | 'leaf_allowed' | 'raw_required'
 362: }
 363: ```
 364: 
 365: ### 6.3 SkillAssetRecord
 366: 
 367: ```ts
 368: interface SkillAssetRecord extends AssetRecord {
 369:   asset_type: 'skill'
 370:   skill_kind:
 371:     | 'method'
 372:     | 'checklist'
 373:     | 'prompt_template'
 374:     | 'workflow_template'
 375:     | 'pattern'
 376:     | 'anti_pattern'
 377:     | 'review_routine'
 378:     | 'debug_routine'
 379:   trigger_conditions: string[]
 380:   prerequisites: string[]
 381:   steps: string[]
 382:   inputs: string[]
 383:   outputs: string[]
 384:   success_signals: string[]
 385:   anti_patterns: string[]
 386:   confidence: number
 387: }
 388: ```
 389: 
 390: ### 6.4 关系边正式枚举
 391: 
 392: ```ts
 393: type AssetEdgeType =
 394:   | 'LEADS_TO'
 395:   | 'APPLIES_TO'
 396:   | 'EXTRACTED_FROM'
 397:   | 'EVOLVES_TO'
 398:   | 'DEPENDS_ON'
 399:   | 'EVIDENCED_BY'
 400:   | 'MATERIALIZED_AS'
 401: ```
 402: 
 403: ---
 404: 
 405: ## 7. 与当前代码现实的正式映射
 406: 
 407: ### 7.1 当前对象到新层的映射
 408: 
 409: | 当前对象 | 当前职责 | 新层定位 |
 410: | --- | --- | --- |
 411: | `session` | 会话级容器 | `RootRef(session)` 的事实入口 |
 412: | `memory_unit` | 结构化记忆单元 / document chunk | `conversation_leaf` 的主要素材，也可作为 `MemoryAsset` 证据 |
 413: | `archive_anchor` | 会话或文档锚点 | `archive_batch / session_milestone / repo_milestone` 的主要素材 |
 414: | `source_asset` | 来源载体 | 证据对象，不直接等于 `ProductAsset` |
 415: | `commit_context` | commit 事实与改动上下文 | `ProductAsset / MemoryAsset / SkillAsset` 的版本证据 |
 416: 
 417: ### 7.2 当前 extraction bundle 的定位
 418: 
 419: 当前 `MemoryExtractionBundle` 是：
 420: 
 421: - deterministic 中间产物
 422: - projection 的输入之一
 423: - graph 同步的 managed source
 424: 
 425: 它不是最终的资产层对象，但可以作为：
 426: 
 427: - `TreeNodeRecord` 的材料
 428: - `MemoryAssetRecord` 的材料
 429: - `AssetEdgeType.EVIDENCED_BY` 的来源
 430: 
 431: ### 7.3 当前 `DataLayerAPI` 的正式位置
 432: 
 433: 当前 `DataLayerAPI` 继续提供：
 434: 
 435: - `search`
 436: - `getSession`
 437: - `listSessions`
 438: - `getCommitContext`
 439: - `getEntityGraph`
 440: 
 441: 而新层不应替换它，而应包裹它：
 442: 
 443: ```ts
 444: interface AssetLayerDependencies {
 445:   data_layer: DataLayerAPI
 446:   getTreeNode(id: string): Promise<TreeNodeRecord | null>
 447:   getAsset(id: string): Promise<AssetRecord | null>
 448:   listMainNodes(input: ProbeMainRequest): Promise<TreeNodeRecord[]>
 449:   listBranchNodes(input: ProbeBranchRequest): Promise<TreeNodeRecord[]>
 450:   listLeafNodes(input: ProbeLeafRequest): Promise<TreeNodeRecord[]>
 451: }
 452: ```
 453: 
 454: ---
 455: 
 456: ## 8. 存储映射正式分工
 457: 
 458: ### 8.1 Git / Gitea
 459: 
 460: 负责：
 461: 
 462: - repo 文件
 463: - clean transcript
 464: - manifest
 465: - workflow artifact
 466: - 用户确认需要版本化的资产快照
 467: 
 468: 不负责：
 469: 
 470: - 高速 recall 查询
 471: - 每次 probe 的运行时状态
 472: 
 473: ### 8.2 `index/search.sqlite`
 474: 
 475: 负责：
 476: 
 477: - transcript session registry
 478: - 基础 recall 入口
 479: - 当前 `DataLayerAPI` 的 session 级检索支持
 480: 
 481: ### 8.3 vector index
 482: 
 483: 负责：
 484: 
 485: - `memory_unit`
 486: - `source_asset`
 487: - 后续 `AssetRecord.embedding_text`
 488: 
 489: ### 8.4 graph index
 490: 
 491: 负责：
 492: 
 493: - session/source/unit/anchor 的 managed graph
 494: - asset edge
 495: - 跨 repo / 跨 scope / 跨 skill 关联
 496: 
 497: ### 8.5 extraction bundle
 498: 
 499: 负责：
 500: 
 501: - deterministic 抽取快照
 502: - projection 输入
 503: - 可重放、可审计的中间状态
 504: 
 505: ### 8.6 计划新增：`index/asset-layer.sqlite`
 506: 
 507: 建议新增一个 materialized projection 库，至少包含：
 508: 
 509: - `tree_nodes`
 510: - `assets`
 511: - `asset_edges`
 512: - `root_refs`
 513: - `materialization_runs`
 514: 
 515: 这一层的原则：
 516: 
 517: - 可重建
 518: - 可局部重算
 519: - 不替代 Git 事实层
 520: 
 521: ---
 522: 
 523: ## 9. 接口 contract
 524: 
 525: ### 9.1 导入接口
 526: 
 527: ```ts
 528: type ImportSourceKind =
 529:   | 'transcript'
 530:   | 'repo_artifact'
 531:   | 'document'
 532:   | 'workflow_artifact'
 533:   | 'manual'
 534: 
 535: interface AssetImportRequest {
 536:   source_kind: ImportSourceKind
 537:   project: string
 538:   scope_id?: string
 539:   source_uri?: string
 540:   import_ref?: string
 541:   session_id?: string
 542:   commit_refs?: string[]
 543: }
 544: 
 545: interface AssetImportResult {
 546:   source_asset_id: string
 547:   project: string
 548:   imported_at: string
 549:   manifest_ref?: string
 550: }
 551: ```
 552: 
 553: ### 9.2 提炼接口
 554: 
 555: ```ts
 556: type ExtractMode = 'deterministic' | 'structured' | 'llm'
 557: 
 558: interface AssetExtractRequest {
 559:   project: string
 560:   root_kind: RootKind
 561:   root_id: string
 562:   source_asset_ids?: string[]
 563:   mode: ExtractMode
 564:   force?: boolean
 565: }
 566: 
 567: interface AssetExtractResult {
 568:   materialization_run_id: string
 569:   tree_node_ids: string[]
 570:   asset_ids: string[]
 571:   edge_ids: string[]
 572:   generated_at: string
 573: }
 574: ```
 575: 
 576: ### 9.3 回写接口
 577: 
 578: ```ts
 579: type WritebackMode = 'snapshot' | 'manifest' | 'knowledge_note'
 580: 
 581: interface AssetWritebackRequest {
 582:   asset_ids: string[]
 583:   target_repo: string
 584:   branch?: string
 585:   mode: WritebackMode
 586:   include_evidence_refs?: boolean
 587: }
 588: 
 589: interface AssetWritebackResult {
 590:   written_paths: string[]
 591:   commit_refs: string[]
 592: }
 593: ```
 594: 
 595: ### 9.4 Probe runtime 接口
 596: 
 597: ```ts
 598: type BudgetProfileId = 'S' | 'M' | 'L' | 'XL' | 'XXL'
 599: 
 600: interface ProbeMainRequest {
 601:   query: string
 602:   root_ref: string
 603:   budget_profile?: BudgetProfileId
 604:   limit?: number
 605: }
 606: 
 607: interface ProbeBranchRequest {
 608:   node_id: string
 609:   query?: string
 610:   budget_profile?: BudgetProfileId
 611:   limit?: number
 612: }
 613: 
 614: interface ProbeLeafRequest {
 615:   node_id: string
 616:   limit?: number
 617: }
 618: 
 619: interface HydrateRawRequest {
 620:   ref: string
 621:   mode?: 'snippet' | 'full'
 622:   max_chars?: number
 623: }
 624: 
 625: interface FullSearchRequest {
 626:   query: string
 627:   scope_id?: string
 628:   project?: string
 629:   targets?: Array<'session' | 'memory_unit' | 'source_asset' | 'archive_anchor' | 'asset'>
 630:   limit?: number
 631: }
 632: ```
 633: 
 634: ### 9.5 Probe response 契约
 635: 
 636: ```ts
 637: type ProbeStopReason =
 638:   | 'enough_context'
 639:   | 'needs_branch'
 640:   | 'needs_leaf'
 641:   | 'needs_raw'
 642:   | 'budget_limit'
 643:   | 'miss'
 644: 
 645: interface ProbeResponse {
 646:   nodes: TreeNodeRecord[]
 647:   related_assets: AssetRecord[]
 648:   evidence_refs: string[]
 649:   stop_reason: ProbeStopReason
 650: }
 651: ```
 652: 
 653: ### 9.6 AssetLayerAPI
 654: 
 655: ```ts
 656: interface AssetLayerAPI {
 657:   probeMain(input: ProbeMainRequest): Promise<ProbeResponse>
 658:   probeBranch(input: ProbeBranchRequest): Promise<ProbeResponse>
 659:   probeLeaf(input: ProbeLeafRequest): Promise<ProbeResponse>
 660:   hydrateRaw(input: HydrateRawRequest): Promise<string | null>
 661:   fullSearch(input: FullSearchRequest): Promise<ProbeResponse>
 662:   getAsset(id: string): Promise<AssetRecord | null>
 663:   traceLineage(assetId: string): Promise<AssetRecord[]>
 664: }
 665: ```
 666: 
 667: 说明：
 668: 
 669: - `fullSearch` 在资产索引未完全落地前，可以内部回落到当前 `DataLayerAPI.search`
 670: - `probeMain / probeBranch / probeLeaf` 优先走 `tree_nodes`
 671: - `hydrateRaw` 只在必须核对原文时触发
 672: 
 673: ---
 674: 
 675: ## 10. 开源核心边界在实现层的落点
 676: 
 677: 本轮进入开源核心的实现内容：
 678: 
 679: - `TreeNodeRecord`
 680: - `AssetRecord`
 681: - `AssetLayerAPI`
 682: - import / extract / writeback contract
 683: - asset projection materialization
 684: - FTS / vector / graph / probe 的统一编排
 685: 
 686: 本轮不进入开源核心的内容：
 687: 
 688: - deer-flow 式完整执行编排
 689: - 重型多 agent UI
 690: - 企业权限、审计、计费
 691: - skill 市场、插件市场
 692: - SaaS 托管层
 693: 
 694: ---
 695: 
 696: ## 11. 第一阶段编码顺序
 697: 
 698: 建议严格按下面的顺序推进：
 699: 
 700: 1. 在 `packages/types` 新增 `TreeNodeRecord / AssetRecord / AssetLayerAPI` 类型
 701: 2. 增加 `index/asset-layer.sqlite` 的 materialized schema
 702: 3. 先把 transcript bundle 投影成 `conversation_leaf / archive_batch / session_milestone`
 703: 4. 在 `DataLayerAPI` 之上实现 `AssetLayerAPI` 的 session 级 probe
 704: 5. 再做 repo 级 workstream / repo milestone materialization
 705: 6. 最后再加 scope view、global milestone、budget profile 调度
 706: 
 707: ---
 708: 
 709: ## 12. 一句话落地结论
 710: 
 711: OpenMnemo 的下一步实现，不是直接推翻当前数据层重来，而是：
 712: 
 713: **保留当前 `DataLayerAPI` 作为底层事实检索面，在其上增加 `TreeNodeRecord + AssetRecord + AssetLayerAPI` 三件套，把创造资产内核真正落成可编码、可投影、可回写的运行时契约。**
 714: 
 715: ---
 716: 
 717: ## 13. 落表级 schema contract
 718: 
 719: 这一节把“实现级契约”再往下压一层，明确哪些字段必须进 SQLite，哪些字段只能作为投影派生结果存在。
 720: 
 721: ### 13.1 通用落表规则
 722: 
 723: - 所有 ID 都使用显式前缀，避免和当前 `memory_unit:* / source_asset:* / archive_anchor:*` 体系混淆。
 724: - 所有数组字段在 SQLite 中统一存为 JSON 文本，避免为单个字段拆出过多辅助表。
 725: - 所有时间戳统一使用 UTC ISO 8601。
 726: - 所有投影对象都必须携带 `project`，`scope_id` 允许为空，但不能靠隐式上下文推导。
 727: - `root_kind + root_id + project` 是最小稳定定位键。
 728: - 投影表只保存可重建的派生结果，不保存原始 transcript、原始 repo 文件或不可逆压缩产物。
 729: 
 730: ### 13.2 `tree_nodes` 表
 731: 
 732: `tree_nodes` 负责承载导航结构，核心责任是“让 probe 能走树”，而不是替代资产层。
 733: 
 734: 建议字段：
 735: 
 736: - `id TEXT PRIMARY KEY`
 737: - `root_kind TEXT NOT NULL`
 738: - `root_id TEXT NOT NULL`
 739: - `project TEXT NOT NULL`
 740: - `scope_id TEXT`
 741: - `node_type TEXT NOT NULL`
 742: - `parent_id TEXT`
 743: - `asset_id TEXT`
 744: - `derived_asset_ids TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 745: - `title TEXT NOT NULL`
 746: - `summary TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''`
 747: - `anchor_text TEXT`
 748: - `keywords TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 749: - `evidence_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 750: - `raw_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 751: - `related_node_ids TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 752: - `related_asset_ids TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 753: - `branch_key TEXT`
 754: - `rank INTEGER`
 755: - `budget_weight REAL`
 756: - `privacy_level TEXT NOT NULL`
 757: - `status TEXT NOT NULL`
 758: - `created_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 759: - `updated_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 760: 
 761: 建议索引：
 762: 
 763: - `(root_kind, root_id, parent_id)`
 764: - `(project, scope_id, node_type)`
 765: - `(asset_id)`
 766: - `(status, updated_at)`
 767: 
 768: 约束：
 769: 
 770: - 根节点的 `parent_id` 必须为空。
 771: - `asset_id` 可空，但一旦存在，必须指向同项目下的资产。
 772: - `scope_mount` 类型只能表达挂载关系，不能携带 raw 事实。
 773: - `budget_weight` 可以为空，但一旦存在必须可用于排序与裁剪。
 774: 
 775: ### 13.3 `assets` 基表
 776: 
 777: `assets` 负责长期复用对象的公共字段，三个资产子类型都必须先落在这张表里。
 778: 
 779: 建议字段：
 780: 
 781: - `id TEXT PRIMARY KEY`
 782: - `asset_type TEXT NOT NULL`
 783: - `project TEXT NOT NULL`
 784: - `scope_id TEXT NOT NULL`
 785: - `title TEXT NOT NULL`
 786: - `summary TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''`
 787: - `status TEXT NOT NULL`
 788: - `privacy_level TEXT NOT NULL`
 789: - `version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1`
 790: - `lineage TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 791: - `supersedes TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 792: - `source_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 793: - `session_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 794: - `commit_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 795: - `evidence_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 796: - `related_asset_ids TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 797: - `related_node_ids TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 798: - `tags TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 799: - `keywords TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 800: - `search_text TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''`
 801: - `embedding_text TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''`
 802: - `created_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 803: - `updated_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 804: 
 805: 约束：
 806: 
 807: - `lineage` 必须可追溯到至少一个前序资产，空值不允许进入最终表。
 808: - `supersedes` 只描述版本关系，不描述业务依赖。
 809: - `search_text` 面向 FTS，`embedding_text` 面向向量层，二者不可互相替代。
 810: 
 811: ### 13.4 子类型详情表
 812: 
 813: 子类型专有字段建议拆到独立详情表，避免 `assets` 基表膨胀。
 814: 
 815: #### `product_assets`
 816: 
 817: - `asset_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY`
 818: - `product_kind TEXT NOT NULL`
 819: - `repo_uri TEXT`
 820: - `repo_path TEXT`
 821: - `branch TEXT`
 822: - `commit_range TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 823: - `artifact_format TEXT`
 824: - `owner_module TEXT`
 825: - `build_state TEXT NOT NULL`
 826: 
 827: #### `memory_assets`
 828: 
 829: - `asset_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY`
 830: - `memory_kind TEXT NOT NULL`
 831: - `root_kind TEXT NOT NULL`
 832: - `root_id TEXT NOT NULL`
 833: - `node_ref TEXT`
 834: - `anchor_text TEXT`
 835: - `raw_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 836: - `parent_memory_id TEXT`
 837: - `child_memory_ids TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 838: - `branch_key TEXT`
 839: - `probe_policy TEXT`
 840: 
 841: #### `skill_assets`
 842: 
 843: - `asset_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY`
 844: - `skill_kind TEXT NOT NULL`
 845: - `trigger_conditions TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 846: - `prerequisites TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 847: - `steps TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 848: - `inputs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 849: - `outputs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 850: - `success_signals TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 851: - `anti_patterns TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 852: - `confidence REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0`
 853: 
 854: ### 13.5 `asset_edges` 表
 855: 
 856: `asset_edges` 负责长期复用关系，不负责树形导航。
 857: 
 858: 建议字段：
 859: 
 860: - `id TEXT PRIMARY KEY`
 861: - `from_asset_id TEXT NOT NULL`
 862: - `to_asset_id TEXT NOT NULL`
 863: - `edge_type TEXT NOT NULL`
 864: - `project TEXT NOT NULL`
 865: - `scope_id TEXT`
 866: - `evidence_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 867: - `weight REAL`
 868: - `created_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 869: - `updated_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 870: 
 871: 建议边类型继续沿用：
 872: 
 873: - `LEADS_TO`
 874: - `APPLIES_TO`
 875: - `EXTRACTED_FROM`
 876: - `EVOLVES_TO`
 877: - `DEPENDS_ON`
 878: - `EVIDENCED_BY`
 879: - `MATERIALIZED_AS`
 880: 
 881: ### 13.6 `root_refs` 与 `materialization_runs`
 882: 
 883: `root_refs` 用来保存“某个根当前投影到了哪里”，`materialization_runs` 用来记录一次投影的输入、输出与状态。
 884: 
 885: #### `root_refs`
 886: 
 887: - `id TEXT PRIMARY KEY`
 888: - `root_kind TEXT NOT NULL`
 889: - `root_id TEXT NOT NULL`
 890: - `project TEXT NOT NULL`
 891: - `scope_id TEXT`
 892: - `projection_version TEXT NOT NULL`
 893: - `head_node_id TEXT`
 894: - `head_asset_id TEXT`
 895: - `materialization_run_id TEXT`
 896: - `privacy_level TEXT NOT NULL`
 897: - `created_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 898: - `updated_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 899: 
 900: #### `materialization_runs`
 901: 
 902: - `id TEXT PRIMARY KEY`
 903: - `projection_version TEXT NOT NULL`
 904: - `root_kind TEXT NOT NULL`
 905: - `root_id TEXT NOT NULL`
 906: - `project TEXT NOT NULL`
 907: - `scope_id TEXT`
 908: - `input_source_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 909: - `input_asset_ids TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 910: - `status TEXT NOT NULL`
 911: - `error_message TEXT`
 912: - `started_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 913: - `finished_at TEXT`
 914: 
 915: 约束：
 916: 
 917: - 同一个 `root_kind + root_id + projection_version` 的重复 materialization 必须幂等。
 918: - `root_refs` 里“最新一条”就是当前视图头，不允许靠外部约定猜测。
 919: - `materialization_runs` 只追加，不回写历史。
 920: 
 921: ---
 922: 
 923: ## 14. Probe / runtime contract 补充
 924: 
 925: 这一节把 probe 的停止条件、回退策略和兼容语义说得更硬一点，避免实现时各层各说各话。
 926: 
 927: ### 14.1 `probeMain`
 928: 
 929: - 输入必须先解析成 `RootRefRecord`。
 930: - `probeMain` 优先读 `tree_nodes`，再补 `assets`，最后才回退到底层 `DataLayerAPI.search`。
 931: - 它返回的是“足够上下文”，不是“尽可能多上下文”。
 932: - 一旦已经命中主线、分支和足够证据，就必须停。
 933: 
 934: ### 14.2 `probeBranch`
 935: 
 936: - 只展开指定节点下的局部上下文。
 937: - 允许带 `query`，但不能绕过父节点约束。
 938: - 对 `budget_profile` 的响应优先级高于对局部召回分数的追求。
 939: 
 940: ### 14.3 `probeLeaf`
 941: 
 942: - 只返回叶子和叶子直接相关的证据。
 943: - 不主动拉高到更大的主线节点。
 944: - 如果叶子本身已经足够说明问题，就不再继续展开。
 945: 
 946: ### 14.4 `hydrateRaw`
 947: 
 948: - 只在需要核对原文、原文件或原始 transcript 时触发。
 949: - 如果权限、scope 或证据不存在，返回 `null`，不伪造内容。
 950: - `hydrateRaw` 不是普通检索接口，它是最后一层回填接口。
 951: 
 952: ### 14.5 兼容语义
 953: 
 954: - `DataLayerAPI` 继续作为稳定底层事实面，不做破坏性改名。
 955: - `AssetLayerAPI` 优先作为 `DataLayerAPI` 之上的投影层出现。
 956: - 当资产层缺数据时，可以回退到 `DataLayerAPI.search`，但不能把回退结果当成资产层真相。
 957: 
 958: ### 14.6 失败语义
 959: 
 960: 建议后续统一至少区分这些错误面：
 961: 
 962: - `INVALID_ROOT_REF`
 963: - `NOT_FOUND`
 964: - `PROJECTION_STALE`
 965: - `RAW_BLOCKED`
 966: - `BUDGET_EXCEEDED`
 967: - `NO_EVIDENCE`
 968: 
 969: ---
 970: 
 971: ## 15. 第一版实现切片建议
 972: 
 973: 如果要把这份契约直接转成代码，建议再切细一点：
 974: 
 975: 1. 先在 `packages/types` 里把 `TreeNodeRecord / AssetRecord / AssetLayerAPI` 定下来。
 976: 2. 再落 `index/asset-layer.sqlite` 的基础表和幂等约束。
 977: 3. 先做 session 级 projection，把 transcript bundle 稳定投影成 `conversation_leaf / archive_batch / session_milestone`。
 978: 4. 再在 `DataLayerAPI` 上挂第一版 `AssetLayerAPI`。
 979: 5. 最后再扩到 repo 级和 global 级视图。

  14: 
  15: ## 1. 这份契约要解决什么
  16: 
  17: 这份文档不是再讨论“方向对不对”，而是把当前已经确认的方向压成一份可编码的 contract。
  18: 
  19: 目标只有四个：
  20: 
  21: - 不推翻当前 `DataLayerAPI`
  22: - 把三类资产模型压成正式字段与接口
  23: - 把记忆树压成正式节点 schema
  24: - 把 Git/Gitea、FTS、vector、graph、runtime API 的职责边界钉死
  25: 
  26: 这意味着本轮的实现原则是：
  27: 
  28: - 先做 `projection layer`
  29: - 不直接把当前运行时 kind 全部改名
  30: - 不把 Git commit 树硬当运行时记忆树
  31: - 不让新资产层和旧数据层平行失控
  32: 
  33: ---
  34: 
  35: ## 2. 四层运行时分工
  36: 
  37: OpenMnemo 当前和下一阶段，应明确分成四层：
  38: 
  39: ### 2.1 Evidence Layer：事实层
  40: 
  41: 事实层只存原始证据与版本事实。
  42: 
  43: 包含：
  44: 
  45: - 原始 transcript
  46: - clean transcript
  47: - repo 文件
  48: - Git commit 历史
  49: - workflow 运行产物
  50: - import manifest
  51: 
  52: 这一层的原则：
  53: 
  54: - 是最终证据源
  55: - 可被版本化
  56: - 可被回溯
  57: - 不因为压缩而丢失
  58: 
  59: ### 2.2 Index Layer：索引层
  60: 
  61: 索引层负责快，不负责成为唯一事实源。
  62: 
  63: 包含：
  64: 
  65: - `index/search.sqlite`
  66: - FTS 候选索引
  67: - vector recall 索引
  68: - graph 索引
  69: - extraction bundle 的索引入口
  70: 
  71: 这一层的原则：
  72: 
  73: - 可以重建
  74: - 允许局部失效后再生成
  75: - 不能成为唯一真相
  76: 
  77: ### 2.3 Projection Layer：投影层
  78: 
  79: 投影层负责把事实层和索引层组织成：
  80: 
  81: - `TreeNodeRecord`
  82: - `ProductAssetRecord`
  83: - `MemoryAssetRecord`
  84: - `SkillAssetRecord`
  85: 
  86: 这一层是本轮新增的核心。
  87: 
  88: 它的职责：
  89: 
  90: - 形成导航结构
  91: - 形成资产结构
  92: - 形成跨层关系
  93: - 承接 probe runtime
  94: 
  95: ### 2.4 Interface Layer：接口层
  96: 
  97: 接口层分两层：
  98: 
  99: - `DataLayerAPI`
 100:   - 继续暴露当前 `session / memory_unit / source_asset / archive_anchor / mixed`
 101: - `AssetLayerAPI`
 102:   - 新增在其上的资产与记忆树运行时接口
 103: 
 104: 结论：
 105: 
 106: **`DataLayerAPI` 保持稳定，`AssetLayerAPI` 作为其上的实现级投影层出现。**
 107: 
 108: ---
 109: 
 110: ## 3. 规范化身份与根引用
 111: 
 112: ### 3.1 RootKind
 113: 
 114: ```ts
 115: type RootKind = 'session' | 'repo' | 'scope'
 116: ```
 117: 
 118: ### 3.2 内部 RootRefRecord
 119: 
 120: public tool 输入阶段可以继续把 `root_ref` 当字符串传入，但运行时内部应统一解析为：
 121: 
 122: ```ts
 123: interface RootRefRecord {
 124:   root_kind: RootKind
 125:   root_id: string
 126:   project?: string
 127:   scope_id?: string
 128: }
 129: ```
 130: 
 131: 规范：
 132: 
 133: - `session` 根对应一个会话容器
 134: - `repo` 根对应一个仓库容器
 135: - `scope` 根对应一个视图容器，而不是物理 repo 副本
 136: 
 137: ### 3.3 ID 规范
 138: 
 139: 所有投影对象都必须用显式前缀命名，避免和现有 `memory_unit:* / source_asset:* / archive_anchor:*` 混淆。
 140: 
 141: 建议前缀：
 142: 
 143: - `tree_node:`
 144: - `product_asset:`
 145: - `memory_asset:`
 146: - `skill_asset:`
 147: - `asset_edge:`
 148: 
 149: 同一对象在所有索引层和图层中必须保持同一个 ID。
 150: 
 151: ---
 152: 
 153: ## 4. TreeNodeRecord：导航节点正式契约
 154: 
 155: 实现层不要直接把每个树节点都等同于资产对象。
 156: 
 157: 建议：
 158: 
 159: - `TreeNodeRecord` 负责导航
 160: - `AssetRecord` 负责长期复用对象
 161: - 二者通过 `asset_id` 或 `derived_asset_ids` 连接
 162: 
 163: ### 4.1 TreeNodeType
 164: 
 165: ```ts
 166: type TreeNodeType =
 167:   | 'conversation_leaf'
 168:   | 'archive_batch'
 169:   | 'session_milestone'
 170:   | 'session_stage'
 171:   | 'repo_stage'
 172:   | 'workstream'
 173:   | 'repo_milestone'
 174:   | 'product_leaf'
 175:   | 'skill_leaf'
 176:   | 'scope_mount'
 177:   | 'global_milestone'
 178: ```
 179: 
 180: ### 4.2 TreeNodeRecord
 181: 
 182: ```ts
 183: type TreeNodeStatus = 'active' | 'superseded' | 'archived'
 184: type PrivacyLevel = 'private' | 'project' | 'shared' | 'public'
 185: 
 186: interface TreeNodeRecord {
 187:   id: string
 188:   root_kind: RootKind
 189:   root_id: string
 190:   project: string
 191:   scope_id?: string
 192:   node_type: TreeNodeType
 193:   parent_id?: string
 194:   child_ids: string[]
 195:   asset_id?: string
 196:   derived_asset_ids?: string[]
 197:   title: string
 198:   summary: string
 199:   anchor_text?: string
 200:   keywords: string[]
 201:   evidence_refs: string[]
 202:   raw_refs: string[]
 203:   related_node_ids: string[]
 204:   related_asset_ids: string[]
 205:   branch_key?: string
 206:   rank?: number
 207:   budget_weight?: number
 208:   privacy_level: PrivacyLevel
 209:   status: TreeNodeStatus
 210:   created_at: string
 211:   updated_at: string
 212: }
 213: ```
 214: 
 215: ### 4.3 节点生成规则
 216: 
 217: - `conversation_leaf`
 218:   - 优先由 `memory_unit` 投影生成
 219: - `archive_batch`
 220:   - 由一组相邻 `conversation_leaf` 收敛生成
 221: - `session_milestone`
 222:   - 由多个 `archive_batch` 与关键决策提炼生成
 223: - `session_stage`
 224:   - 由多个 `session_milestone` 串成主线
 225: - `workstream`
 226:   - 由 repo 范围内同类 session milestone、commit context、artifact cluster 聚合生成
 227: - `repo_milestone`
 228:   - 由 repo 阶段性结果、约束、决策聚合生成
 229: - `scope_mount`
 230:   - 只表达 repo 与 scope 的挂载关系，不挂 raw
 231: 
 232: ### 4.4 节点与预算的关系
 233: 
 234: 每个节点必须有 `budget_weight` 或可被计算出预算权重，用于：
 235: 
 236: - 小窗口模型优先停在主线
 237: - 大窗口模型允许展开 branch
 238: - raw hydration 时控制注入比例
 239: 
 240: ---
 241: 
 242: ## 5. BaseAssetRecord：三类资产共享正式字段
 243: 
 244: 本轮不再停留在“建议字段”，而采用共享字段分组。
 245: 
 246: ### 5.1 共享基础字段
 247: 
 248: ```ts
 249: type AssetType = 'product' | 'memory' | 'skill'
 250: type AssetStatus = 'draft' | 'active' | 'superseded' | 'archived'
 251: 
 252: interface BaseAssetRecord {
 253:   id: string
 254:   asset_type: AssetType
 255:   project: string
 256:   scope_id: string
 257:   title: string
 258:   summary: string
 259:   status: AssetStatus
 260:   privacy_level: PrivacyLevel
 261:   created_at: string
 262:   updated_at: string
 263: }
 264: ```
 265: 
 266: ### 5.2 共享索引字段
 267: 
 268: ```ts
 269: interface BaseAssetIndexFields {
 270:   tags: string[]
 271:   keywords: string[]
 272:   search_text: string
 273:   embedding_text: string
 274: }
 275: ```
 276: 
 277: ### 5.3 共享关系字段
 278: 
 279: ```ts
 280: interface BaseAssetRelationFields {
 281:   source_refs: string[]
 282:   session_refs: string[]
 283:   commit_refs: string[]
 284:   evidence_refs: string[]
 285:   related_asset_ids: string[]
 286:   related_node_ids: string[]
 287: }
 288: ```
 289: 
 290: ### 5.4 共享版本字段
 291: 
 292: ```ts
 293: interface BaseAssetVersionFields {
 294:   version: number
 295:   lineage: string[]
 296:   supersedes: string[]
 297:   snapshot_at?: string
 298: }
 299: ```
 300: 
 301: ### 5.5 实现层统一组合
 302: 
 303: ```ts
 304: type AssetRecord =
 305:   BaseAssetRecord
 306:   & BaseAssetIndexFields
 307:   & BaseAssetRelationFields
 308:   & BaseAssetVersionFields
 309: ```
 310: 
 311: ---

 313: ## 6. 三类资产正式契约
 314: 
 315: ### 6.1 ProductAssetRecord

 317: ```ts

 319:   asset_type: 'product'
 320:   product_kind:
 321:     | 'file'

 325:     | 'config'

 395:   | 'APPLIES_TO'
 396:   | 'EXTRACTED_FROM'

 404: 
 405: ## 7. 与当前代码现实的正式映射
 406: 
 407: ### 7.1 当前对象到新层的映射
 408: 
 409: | 当前对象 | 当前职责 | 新层定位 |
 410: | --- | --- | --- |
 411: | `session` | 会话级容器 | `RootRef(session)` 的事实入口 |
 412: | `memory_unit` | 结构化记忆单元 / document chunk | `conversation_leaf` 的主要素材，也可作为 `MemoryAsset` 证据 |
 413: | `archive_anchor` | 会话或文档锚点 | `archive_batch / session_milestone / repo_milestone` 的主要素材 |
 414: | `source_asset` | 来源载体 | 证据对象，不直接等于 `ProductAsset` |
 415: | `commit_context` | commit 事实与改动上下文 | `ProductAsset / MemoryAsset / SkillAsset` 的版本证据 |
 416: 
 417: ### 7.2 当前 extraction bundle 的定位
 418: 
 419: 当前 `MemoryExtractionBundle` 是：
 420: 
 421: - deterministic 中间产物
 422: - projection 的输入之一
 423: - graph 同步的 managed source
 424: 
 425: 它不是最终的资产层对象，但可以作为：
 426: 
 427: - `TreeNodeRecord` 的材料
 428: - `MemoryAssetRecord` 的材料
 429: - `AssetEdgeType.EVIDENCED_BY` 的来源
 430: 
 431: ### 7.3 当前 `DataLayerAPI` 的正式位置
 432: 
 433: 当前 `DataLayerAPI` 继续提供：
 434: 
 435: - `search`
 436: - `getSession`
 437: - `listSessions`
 438: - `getCommitContext`
 439: - `getEntityGraph`
 440: 
 441: 而新层不应替换它，而应包裹它：
 442: 
 443: ```ts
 444: interface AssetLayerDependencies {
 445:   data_layer: DataLayerAPI
 446:   getTreeNode(id: string): Promise<TreeNodeRecord | null>
 447:   getAsset(id: string): Promise<AssetRecord | null>
 448:   listMainNodes(input: ProbeMainRequest): Promise<TreeNodeRecord[]>
 449:   listBranchNodes(input: ProbeBranchRequest): Promise<TreeNodeRecord[]>
 450:   listLeafNodes(input: ProbeLeafRequest): Promise<TreeNodeRecord[]>
 451: }
 452: ```
 453: 
 454: ---
 455: 
 456: ## 8. 存储映射正式分工
 457: 
 458: ### 8.1 Git / Gitea
 459: 
 460: 负责：
 461: 
 462: - repo 文件
 463: - clean transcript
 464: - manifest
 465: - workflow artifact
 466: - 用户确认需要版本化的资产快照
 467: 
 468: 不负责：
 469: 
 470: - 高速 recall 查询
 471: - 每次 probe 的运行时状态
 472: 
 473: ### 8.2 `index/search.sqlite`
 474: 
 475: 负责：
 476: 
 477: - transcript session registry
 478: - 基础 recall 入口
 479: - 当前 `DataLayerAPI` 的 session 级检索支持
 480: 
 481: ### 8.3 vector index
 482: 
 483: 负责：
 484: 
 485: - `memory_unit`
 486: - `source_asset`
 487: - 后续 `AssetRecord.embedding_text`
 488: 
 489: ### 8.4 graph index
 490: 
 491: 负责：
 492: 
 493: - session/source/unit/anchor 的 managed graph
 494: - asset edge
 495: - 跨 repo / 跨 scope / 跨 skill 关联
 496: 
 497: ### 8.5 extraction bundle
 498: 
 499: 负责：
 500: 
 501: - deterministic 抽取快照
 502: - projection 输入
 503: - 可重放、可审计的中间状态
 504: 
 505: ### 8.6 计划新增：`index/asset-layer.sqlite`
 506: 
 507: 建议新增一个 materialized projection 库，至少包含：
 508: 
 509: - `tree_nodes`
 510: - `assets`
 511: - `asset_edges`
 512: - `root_refs`
 513: - `materialization_runs`
 514: 
 515: 这一层的原则：
 516: 
 517: - 可重建
 518: - 可局部重算
 519: - 不替代 Git 事实层
 520: 
 521: ---
 522: 
 523: ## 9. 接口 contract
 524: 
 525: ### 9.1 导入接口
 526: 
 527: ```ts
 528: type ImportSourceKind =
 529:   | 'transcript'
 530:   | 'repo_artifact'
 531:   | 'document'
 532:   | 'workflow_artifact'
 533:   | 'manual'
 534: 
 535: interface AssetImportRequest {
 536:   source_kind: ImportSourceKind
 537:   project: string
 538:   scope_id?: string
 539:   source_uri?: string
 540:   import_ref?: string
 541:   session_id?: string
 542:   commit_refs?: string[]
 543: }
 544: 
 545: interface AssetImportResult {
 546:   source_asset_id: string
 547:   project: string
 548:   imported_at: string
 549:   manifest_ref?: string
 550: }
 551: ```
 552: 
 553: ### 9.2 提炼接口
 554: 
 555: ```ts
 556: type ExtractMode = 'deterministic' | 'structured' | 'llm'
 557: 
 558: interface AssetExtractRequest {
 559:   project: string
 560:   root_kind: RootKind
 561:   root_id: string
 562:   source_asset_ids?: string[]
 563:   mode: ExtractMode
 564:   force?: boolean
 565: }
 566: 
 567: interface AssetExtractResult {
 568:   materialization_run_id: string
 569:   tree_node_ids: string[]
 570:   asset_ids: string[]
 571:   edge_ids: string[]
 572:   generated_at: string
 573: }
 574: ```
 575: 
 576: ### 9.3 回写接口
 577: 
 578: ```ts
 579: type WritebackMode = 'snapshot' | 'manifest' | 'knowledge_note'
 580: 
 581: interface AssetWritebackRequest {
 582:   asset_ids: string[]
 583:   target_repo: string
 584:   branch?: string
 585:   mode: WritebackMode
 586:   include_evidence_refs?: boolean
 587: }
 588: 
 589: interface AssetWritebackResult {
 590:   written_paths: string[]
 591:   commit_refs: string[]
 592: }
 593: ```
 594: 
 595: ### 9.4 Probe runtime 接口
 596: 
 597: ```ts
 598: type BudgetProfileId = 'S' | 'M' | 'L' | 'XL' | 'XXL'
 599: 
 600: interface ProbeMainRequest {
 601:   query: string
 602:   root_ref: string
 603:   budget_profile?: BudgetProfileId
 604:   limit?: number
 605: }
 606: 
 607: interface ProbeBranchRequest {
 608:   node_id: string
 609:   query?: string
 610:   budget_profile?: BudgetProfileId
 611:   limit?: number
 612: }
 613: 
 614: interface ProbeLeafRequest {
 615:   node_id: string
 616:   limit?: number
 617: }
 618: 
 619: interface HydrateRawRequest {
 620:   ref: string
 621:   mode?: 'snippet' | 'full'
 622:   max_chars?: number
 623: }
 624: 
 625: interface FullSearchRequest {
 626:   query: string
 627:   scope_id?: string
 628:   project?: string
 629:   targets?: Array<'session' | 'memory_unit' | 'source_asset' | 'archive_anchor' | 'asset'>
 630:   limit?: number
 631: }
 632: ```
 633: 
 634: ### 9.5 Probe response 契约
 635: 
 636: ```ts
 637: type ProbeStopReason =
 638:   | 'enough_context'
 639:   | 'needs_branch'
 640:   | 'needs_leaf'
 641:   | 'needs_raw'
 642:   | 'budget_limit'
 643:   | 'miss'
 644: 
 645: interface ProbeResponse {
 646:   nodes: TreeNodeRecord[]
 647:   related_assets: AssetRecord[]
 648:   evidence_refs: string[]
 649:   stop_reason: ProbeStopReason
 650: }
 651: ```
 652: 
 653: ### 9.6 AssetLayerAPI
 654: 
 655: ```ts
 656: interface AssetLayerAPI {
 657:   probeMain(input: ProbeMainRequest): Promise<ProbeResponse>
 658:   probeBranch(input: ProbeBranchRequest): Promise<ProbeResponse>
 659:   probeLeaf(input: ProbeLeafRequest): Promise<ProbeResponse>
 660:   hydrateRaw(input: HydrateRawRequest): Promise<string | null>
 661:   fullSearch(input: FullSearchRequest): Promise<ProbeResponse>
 662:   getAsset(id: string): Promise<AssetRecord | null>
 663:   traceLineage(assetId: string): Promise<AssetRecord[]>
 664: }
 665: ```
 666: 
 667: 说明：
 668: 
 669: - `fullSearch` 在资产索引未完全落地前，可以内部回落到当前 `DataLayerAPI.search`
 670: - `probeMain / probeBranch / probeLeaf` 优先走 `tree_nodes`
 671: - `hydrateRaw` 只在必须核对原文时触发
 672: 
 673: ---
 674: 
 675: ## 10. 开源核心边界在实现层的落点
 676: 
 677: 本轮进入开源核心的实现内容：
 678: 
 679: - `TreeNodeRecord`
 680: - `AssetRecord`
 681: - `AssetLayerAPI`
 682: - import / extract / writeback contract
 683: - asset projection materialization
 684: - FTS / vector / graph / probe 的统一编排
 685: 
 686: 本轮不进入开源核心的内容：
 687: 
 688: - deer-flow 式完整执行编排
 689: - 重型多 agent UI
 690: - 企业权限、审计、计费
 691: - skill 市场、插件市场
 692: - SaaS 托管层
 693: 
 694: ---
 695: 
 696: ## 11. 第一阶段编码顺序
 697: 
 698: 建议严格按下面的顺序推进：
 699: 
 700: 1. 在 `packages/types` 新增 `TreeNodeRecord / AssetRecord / AssetLayerAPI` 类型
 701: 2. 增加 `index/asset-layer.sqlite` 的 materialized schema
 702: 3. 先把 transcript bundle 投影成 `conversation_leaf / archive_batch / session_milestone`
 703: 4. 在 `DataLayerAPI` 之上实现 `AssetLayerAPI` 的 session 级 probe
 704: 5. 再做 repo 级 workstream / repo milestone materialization
 705: 6. 最后再加 scope view、global milestone、budget profile 调度
 706:

 708: 
 709: ## 12. 一句话落地结论
 710: 
 711: OpenMnemo 的下一步实现，不是直接推翻当前数据层重来，而是：
 712: 
 713: **保留当前 `DataLayerAPI` 作为底层事实检索面，在其上增加 `TreeNodeRecord + AssetRecord + AssetLayerAPI` 三件套，把创造资产内核真正落成可编码、可投影、可回写的运行时契约。**
 714: 
 715: ---
 716: 
 717: ## 13. 落表级 schema contract
 718: 
 719: 这一节把“实现级契约”再往下压一层，明确哪些字段必须进 SQLite，哪些字段只能作为投影派生结果存在。
 720: 
 721: ### 13.1 通用落表规则
 722: 
 723: - 所有 ID 都使用显式前缀，避免和当前 `memory_unit:* / source_asset:* / archive_anchor:*` 体系混淆。
 724: - 所有数组字段在 SQLite 中统一存为 JSON 文本，避免为单个字段拆出过多辅助表。
 725: - 所有时间戳统一使用 UTC ISO 8601。
 726: - 所有投影对象都必须携带 `project`，`scope_id` 允许为空，但不能靠隐式上下文推导。
 727: - `root_kind + root_id + project` 是最小稳定定位键。
 728: - 投影表只保存可重建的派生结果，不保存原始 transcript、原始 repo 文件或不可逆压缩产物。
 729: 
 730: ### 13.2 `tree_nodes` 表
 731: 
 732: `tree_nodes` 负责承载导航结构，核心责任是“让 probe 能走树”，而不是替代资产层。
 733: 
 734: 建议字段：
 735: 
 736: - `id TEXT PRIMARY KEY`
 737: - `root_kind TEXT NOT NULL`
 738: - `root_id TEXT NOT NULL`
 739: - `project TEXT NOT NULL`
 740: - `scope_id TEXT`
 741: - `node_type TEXT NOT NULL`
 742: - `parent_id TEXT`
 743: - `asset_id TEXT`
 744: - `derived_asset_ids TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 745: - `title TEXT NOT NULL`
 746: - `summary TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''`
 747: - `anchor_text TEXT`
 748: - `keywords TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 749: - `evidence_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 750: - `raw_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 751: - `related_node_ids TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 752: - `related_asset_ids TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 753: - `branch_key TEXT`
 754: - `rank INTEGER`
 755: - `budget_weight REAL`
 756: - `privacy_level TEXT NOT NULL`
 757: - `status TEXT NOT NULL`
 758: - `created_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 759: - `updated_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 760: 
 761: 建议索引：
 762: 
 763: - `(root_kind, root_id, parent_id)`
 764: - `(project, scope_id, node_type)`
 765: - `(asset_id)`
 766: - `(status, updated_at)`
 767: 
 768: 约束：
 769: 
 770: - 根节点的 `parent_id` 必须为空。
 771: - `asset_id` 可空，但一旦存在，必须指向同项目下的资产。
 772: - `scope_mount` 类型只能表达挂载关系，不能携带 raw 事实。
 773: - `budget_weight` 可以为空，但一旦存在必须可用于排序与裁剪。
 774: 
 775: ### 13.3 `assets` 基表
 776: 
 777: `assets` 负责长期复用对象的公共字段，三个资产子类型都必须先落在这张表里。
 778: 
 779: 建议字段：
 780: 
 781: - `id TEXT PRIMARY KEY`
 782: - `asset_type TEXT NOT NULL`
 783: - `project TEXT NOT NULL`
 784: - `scope_id TEXT NOT NULL`
 785: - `title TEXT NOT NULL`
 786: - `summary TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''`
 787: - `status TEXT NOT NULL`
 788: - `privacy_level TEXT NOT NULL`
 789: - `version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1`
 790: - `lineage TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 791: - `supersedes TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 792: - `source_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 793: - `session_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 794: - `commit_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 795: - `evidence_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 796: - `related_asset_ids TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 797: - `related_node_ids TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 798: - `tags TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 799: - `keywords TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 800: - `search_text TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''`
 801: - `embedding_text TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''`
 802: - `created_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 803: - `updated_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 804: 
 805: 约束：
 806: 
 807: - `lineage` 必须可追溯到至少一个前序资产，空值不允许进入最终表。
 808: - `supersedes` 只描述版本关系，不描述业务依赖。
 809: - `search_text` 面向 FTS，`embedding_text` 面向向量层，二者不可互相替代。
 810: 
 811: ### 13.4 子类型详情表
 812: 
 813: 子类型专有字段建议拆到独立详情表，避免 `assets` 基表膨胀。
 814: 
 815: #### `product_assets`
 816: 
 817: - `asset_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY`
 818: - `product_kind TEXT NOT NULL`
 819: - `repo_uri TEXT`
 820: - `repo_path TEXT`
 821: - `branch TEXT`
 822: - `commit_range TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 823: - `artifact_format TEXT`
 824: - `owner_module TEXT`
 825: - `build_state TEXT NOT NULL`
 826: 
 827: #### `memory_assets`
 828: 
 829: - `asset_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY`
 830: - `memory_kind TEXT NOT NULL`
 831: - `root_kind TEXT NOT NULL`
 832: - `root_id TEXT NOT NULL`
 833: - `node_ref TEXT`
 834: - `anchor_text TEXT`
 835: - `raw_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 836: - `parent_memory_id TEXT`
 837: - `child_memory_ids TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 838: - `branch_key TEXT`
 839: - `probe_policy TEXT`
 840: 
 841: #### `skill_assets`
 842: 
 843: - `asset_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY`
 844: - `skill_kind TEXT NOT NULL`
 845: - `trigger_conditions TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 846: - `prerequisites TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 847: - `steps TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 848: - `inputs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 849: - `outputs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 850: - `success_signals TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 851: - `anti_patterns TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 852: - `confidence REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0`
 853: 
 854: ### 13.5 `asset_edges` 表
 855: 
 856: `asset_edges` 负责长期复用关系，不负责树形导航。
 857: 
 858: 建议字段：
 859: 
 860: - `id TEXT PRIMARY KEY`
 861: - `from_asset_id TEXT NOT NULL`
 862: - `to_asset_id TEXT NOT NULL`
 863: - `edge_type TEXT NOT NULL`
 864: - `project TEXT NOT NULL`
 865: - `scope_id TEXT`
 866: - `evidence_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 867: - `weight REAL`
 868: - `created_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 869: - `updated_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 870: 
 871: 建议边类型继续沿用：
 872: 
 873: - `LEADS_TO`
 874: - `APPLIES_TO`
 875: - `EXTRACTED_FROM`
 876: - `EVOLVES_TO`
 877: - `DEPENDS_ON`
 878: - `EVIDENCED_BY`
 879: - `MATERIALIZED_AS`
 880: 
 881: ### 13.6 `root_refs` 与 `materialization_runs`
 882: 
 883: `root_refs` 用来保存“某个根当前投影到了哪里”，`materialization_runs` 用来记录一次投影的输入、输出与状态。
 884: 
 885: #### `root_refs`
 886: 
 887: - `id TEXT PRIMARY KEY`
 888: - `root_kind TEXT NOT NULL`
 889: - `root_id TEXT NOT NULL`
 890: - `project TEXT NOT NULL`
 891: - `scope_id TEXT`
 892: - `projection_version TEXT NOT NULL`
 893: - `head_node_id TEXT`
 894: - `head_asset_id TEXT`
 895: - `materialization_run_id TEXT`
 896: - `privacy_level TEXT NOT NULL`
 897: - `created_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 898: - `updated_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 899: 
 900: #### `materialization_runs`
 901: 
 902: - `id TEXT PRIMARY KEY`
 903: - `projection_version TEXT NOT NULL`
 904: - `root_kind TEXT NOT NULL`
 905: - `root_id TEXT NOT NULL`
 906: - `project TEXT NOT NULL`
 907: - `scope_id TEXT`
 908: - `input_source_refs TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 909: - `input_asset_ids TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
 910: - `status TEXT NOT NULL`
 911: - `error_message TEXT`
 912: - `started_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 913: - `finished_at TEXT`
 914: 
 915: 约束：
 916: 
 917: - 同一个 `root_kind + root_id + projection_version` 的重复 materialization 必须幂等。
 918: - `root_refs` 里“最新一条”就是当前视图头，不允许靠外部约定猜测。
 919: - `materialization_runs` 只追加，不回写历史。
 920: 
 921: ---
 922: 
 923: ## 14. Probe / runtime contract 补充
 924: 
 925: 这一节把 probe 的停止条件、回退策略和兼容语义说得更硬一点，避免实现时各层各说各话。
 926: 
 927: ### 14.1 `probeMain`
 928: 
 929: - 输入必须先解析成 `RootRefRecord`。
 930: - `probeMain` 优先读 `tree_nodes`，再补 `assets`，最后才回退到底层 `DataLayerAPI.search`。
 931: - 它返回的是“足够上下文”，不是“尽可能多上下文”。
 932: - 一旦已经命中主线、分支和足够证据，就必须停。
 933: 
 934: ### 14.2 `probeBranch`
 935: 
 936: - 只展开指定节点下的局部上下文。
 937: - 允许带 `query`，但不能绕过父节点约束。
 938: - 对 `budget_profile` 的响应优先级高于对局部召回分数的追求。
 939: 
 940: ### 14.3 `probeLeaf`
 941: 
 942: - 只返回叶子和叶子直接相关的证据。
 943: - 不主动拉高到更大的主线节点。
 944: - 如果叶子本身已经足够说明问题，就不再继续展开。
 945: 
 946: ### 14.4 `hydrateRaw`
 947: 
 948: - 只在需要核对原文、原文件或原始 transcript 时触发。
 949: - 如果权限、scope 或证据不存在，返回 `null`，不伪造内容。
 950: - `hydrateRaw` 不是普通检索接口，它是最后一层回填接口。
 951: 
 952: ### 14.5 兼容语义
 953: 
 954: - `DataLayerAPI` 继续作为稳定底层事实面，不做破坏性改名。
 955: - `AssetLayerAPI` 优先作为 `DataLayerAPI` 之上的投影层出现。
 956: - 当资产层缺数据时，可以回退到 `DataLayerAPI.search`，但不能把回退结果当成资产层真相。
 957: 
 958: ### 14.6 失败语义
 959: 
 960: 建议后续统一至少区分这些错误面：
 961: 
 962: - `INVALID_ROOT_REF`
 963: - `NOT_FOUND`
 964: - `PROJECTION_STALE`
 965: - `RAW_BLOCKED`
 966: - `BUDGET_EXCEEDED`
 967: - `NO_EVIDENCE`
 968: 
 969: ---
 970: 
 971: ## 15. 第一版实现切片建议
 972: 
 973: 如果要把这份契约直接转成代码，建议再切细一点：
 974: 
 975: 1. 先在 `packages/types` 里把 `TreeNodeRecord / AssetRecord / AssetLayerAPI` 定下来。
 976: 2. 再落 `index/asset-layer.sqlite` 的基础表和幂等约束。
 977: 3. 先做 session 级 projection，把 transcript bundle 稳定投影成 `conversation_leaf / archive_batch / session_milestone`。
 978: 4. 再在 `DataLayerAPI` 上挂第一版 `AssetLayerAPI`。
 979: 5. 最后再扩到 repo 级和 global 级视图。

  23: 
  24: export interface DataLayerAPI {
  25:   search(query: DataLayerSearchQuery): Promise<DataLayerSearchResponse>
  26:   getSession(id: string): Promise<SessionDetail | null>
  27:   listSessions(filter?: DataLayerListSessionsFilter): Promise<DataLayerListSessionsPage>
  28:   getCommitContext(sessionId: string): Promise<CommitContext | null>

  30: }
  31: 
  32: export interface DataLayerDependencies {
  33:   retrieval: RetrievalTools
  34:   getSession(id: string): Promise<SessionDetail | null>
  35:   listSessions(filter?: DataLayerListSessionsFilter): Promise<DataLayerListSessionsPage>
  36:   getCommitContext(sessionId: string): Promise<CommitContext | null>
  37:   getEntityGraph(entityName: string): Promise<EntityGraphView>

  39:   getMemoryUnit?(id: string): Promise<MemoryUnit | null>
  40:   getSourceAsset?(id: string): Promise<SourceAsset | null>
  41:   getArchiveAnchor?(id: string): Promise<ArchiveAnchor | null>
  42: }
  43: 
  44: function mixedCandidateLimit(limit?: number): number {
  45:   const effectiveLimit = toEffectiveRetrievalLimit(limit)
  46:   if (effectiveLimit === Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER) return effectiveLimit
  47:   return Math.min(Math.max(effectiveLimit * 4, effectiveLimit), 200)
  48: }
  49: 
  50: async function runSearch(
  51:   retrieval: RetrievalTools,
  52:   query: DataLayerSearchQuery,
  53: ): Promise<RetrievalReference[]> {
  54:   const executionQuery = query.limit === 0
  55:     ? { ...query, limit: toEffectiveRetrievalLimit(query.limit) }
  56:     : query
  57: 
  58:   switch (query.target) {
  59:     case 'session':
  60:       return retrieval.searchSessions(executionQuery)
  61:     case 'memory_unit':
  62:       return retrieval.searchMemoryUnits(executionQuery)
  63:     case 'source_asset':
  64:       return retrieval.searchSourceAssets ? retrieval.searchSourceAssets(executionQuery) : []
  65:     case 'archive_anchor':
  66:       return retrieval.searchArchiveAnchors ? retrieval.searchArchiveAnchors(executionQuery) : []
  67:     case 'mixed': {
  68:       const effectiveLimit = toEffectiveRetrievalLimit(query.limit)
  69:       const candidateQuery = {
  70:         ...executionQuery,
  71:         limit: mixedCandidateLimit(query.limit),
  72:       }
  73:       const results = await Promise.all([
  74:         retrieval.searchSessions(candidateQuery),
  75:         retrieval.searchMemoryUnits(candidateQuery),
  76:         retrieval.searchSourceAssets ? retrieval.searchSourceAssets(candidateQuery) : Promise.resolve([]),
  77:         retrieval.searchArchiveAnchors ? retrieval.searchArchiveAnchors(candidateQuery) : Promise.resolve([]),
  78:       ])
  79:       return dedupeRetrievalReferences(results.flat())
  80:         .sort(compareRetrievalReferences)
  81:         .slice(0, mixedCandidateLimit(effectiveLimit))
  82:     }
  83:   }
  84: 
  85:   return []
  86: }
  87: 
  88: async function hydrateSearchHit(
  89:   deps: DataLayerDependencies,
  90:   ref: RetrievalReference,
  91: ): Promise<DataLayerSearchHit> {
  92:   switch (ref.kind) {
  93:     case 'session': {
  94:       const session = await deps.getSession(ref.id)
  95:       return session ? { ref, session } : { ref }
  96:     }
  97:     case 'memory_unit': {
  98:       const memoryUnit = deps.getMemoryUnit ? await deps.getMemoryUnit(ref.id) : null
  99:       const session = deps.getSessionForRef ? await deps.getSessionForRef(ref) : null
 100:       return {
 101:         ref,
 102:         ...(memoryUnit ? { memory_unit: memoryUnit } : {}),
 103:         ...(session ? { session } : {}),
 104:       }
 105:     }
 106:     case 'source_asset': {
 107:       const sourceAsset = deps.getSourceAsset
 108:         ? await deps.getSourceAsset(ref.id)
 109:         : await deps.retrieval.getSourceAsset(ref.id)
 110:       const session = deps.getSessionForRef ? await deps.getSessionForRef(ref) : null
 111:       return {
 112:         ref,
 113:         ...(sourceAsset ? { source_asset: sourceAsset } : {}),
 114:         ...(session ? { session } : {}),
 115:       }
 116:     }
 117:     case 'archive_anchor': {
 118:       const archiveAnchor = deps.getArchiveAnchor
 119:         ? await deps.getArchiveAnchor(ref.id)
 120:         : await deps.retrieval.getArchiveAnchor(ref.id)
 121:       const session = deps.getSessionForRef ? await deps.getSessionForRef(ref) : null
 122:       return {
 123:         ref,
 124:         ...(archiveAnchor ? { archive_anchor: archiveAnchor } : {}),
 125:         ...(session ? { session } : {}),
 126:       }
 127:     }
 128:     case 'commit':
 129:       return { ref }
 130:   }
 131: }
 132: 
 133: function mixedHitPriority(hit: DataLayerSearchHit): number {
 134:   switch (hit.ref.kind) {
 135:     case 'memory_unit':
 136:       return 0
 137:     case 'source_asset':
 138:       return 1
 139:     case 'archive_anchor':
 140:       return 2
 141:     case 'session':
 142:       return 3
 143:     case 'commit':
 144:       return 4
 145:   }
 146: }
 147: 
 148: function compareMixedHits(left: DataLayerSearchHit, right: DataLayerSearchHit): number {
 149:   return mixedHitPriority(left) - mixedHitPriority(right)
 150:     || compareRetrievalReferences(left.ref, right.ref)
 151: }
 152: 
 153: function normalizeMixedHits(
 154:   hits: DataLayerSearchHit[],
 155:   limit?: number,
 156: ): DataLayerSearchHit[] {
 157:   const coveredSessions = new Set(
 158:     hits
 159:       .filter((hit) => hit.ref.kind !== 'session' && typeof hit.session?.session_id === 'string')
 160:       .map((hit) => hit.session!.session_id),
 161:   )
 162: 
 163:   return hits
 164:     .filter((hit) => !(hit.ref.kind === 'session'
 165:       && typeof hit.session?.session_id === 'string'
 166:       && coveredSessions.has(hit.session.session_id)))
 167:     .sort(compareMixedHits)
 168:     .slice(0, toEffectiveRetrievalLimit(limit))
 169: }
 170: 
 171: export function createDataLayerAPI(deps: DataLayerDependencies): DataLayerAPI {
 172:   return {
 173:     async search(query: DataLayerSearchQuery): Promise<DataLayerSearchResponse> {
 174:       const normalized = normalizeDataLayerSearchQuery(query)
 175:       const refs = await runSearch(deps.retrieval, normalized)
 176:       const hits = await Promise.all(refs.map((ref) => hydrateSearchHit(deps, ref)))
 177:       return {
 178:         query: normalized,
 179:         hits: normalized.target === 'mixed'
 180:           ? normalizeMixedHits(hits, normalized.limit)
 181:           : hits,
 182:       }
 183:     },
 184: 
 185:     getSession(id: string): Promise<SessionDetail | null> {
 186:       return deps.getSession(id)
 187:     },
 188: 
 189:     listSessions(filter?: DataLayerListSessionsFilter): Promise<DataLayerListSessionsPage> {
 190:       return deps.listSessions(filter)
 191:     },
 192: 
 193:     getCommitContext(sessionId: string): Promise<CommitContext | null> {
 194:       return deps.getCommitContext(sessionId)
 195:     },
 196: 
 197:     getEntityGraph(entityName: string): Promise<EntityGraphView> {
 198:       return deps.getEntityGraph(entityName)
 199:     },
 200:   }
 201: }

 134:   switch (hit.ref.kind) {
 135:     case 'memory_unit':
 136:       return 0
 137:     case 'source_asset':
 138:       return 1
 139:     case 'archive_anchor':
 140:       return 2
 141:     case 'session':
 142:       return 3
 143:     case 'commit':
 144:       return 4
 145:   }
 146: }
 147: 
 148: function compareMixedHits(left: DataLayerSearchHit, right: DataLayerSearchHit): number {
 149:   return mixedHitPriority(left) - mixedHitPriority(right)
 150:     || compareRetrievalReferences(left.ref, right.ref)
 151: }
 152: 
 153: function normalizeMixedHits(
 154:   hits: DataLayerSearchHit[],
 155:   limit?: number,
 156: ): DataLayerSearchHit[] {
 157:   const coveredSessions = new Set(
 158:     hits
 159:       .filter((hit) => hit.ref.kind !== 'session' && typeof hit.session?.session_id === 'string')
 160:       .map((hit) => hit.session!.session_id),
 161:   )
 162: 
 163:   return hits
 164:     .filter((hit) => !(hit.ref.kind === 'session'
 165:       && typeof hit.session?.session_id === 'string'
 166:       && coveredSessions.has(hit.session.session_id)))
 167:     .sort(compareMixedHits)
 168:     .slice(0, toEffectiveRetrievalLimit(limit))
 169: }
 170: 
 171: export function createDataLayerAPI(deps: DataLayerDependencies): DataLayerAPI {
 172:   return {
 173:     async search(query: DataLayerSearchQuery): Promise<DataLayerSearchResponse> {
 174:       const normalized = normalizeDataLayerSearchQuery(query)
 175:       const refs = await runSearch(deps.retrieval, normalized)
 176:       const hits = await Promise.all(refs.map((ref) => hydrateSearchHit(deps, ref)))
 177:       return {
 178:         query: normalized,
 179:         hits: normalized.target === 'mixed'
 180:           ? normalizeMixedHits(hits, normalized.limit)
 181:           : hits,
 182:       }
 183:     },
 184: 
 185:     getSession(id: string): Promise<SessionDetail | null> {
 186:       return deps.getSession(id)
 187:     },
 188: 
 189:     listSessions(filter?: DataLayerListSessionsFilter): Promise<DataLayerListSessionsPage> {
 190:       return deps.listSessions(filter)
 191:     },
 192: 
 193:     getCommitContext(sessionId: string): Promise<CommitContext | null> {
 194:       return deps.getCommitContext(sessionId)
 195:     },
 196: 
 197:     getEntityGraph(entityName: string): Promise<EntityGraphView> {
 198:       return deps.getEntityGraph(entityName)
 199:     },
 200:   }
 201: }

 260:     sessionNode,

 292:         summary: unit.summary,
 293:         source_ref: unit.source_ref,
 294:       }),
 295:     })),
 296:   ]
 297: 
 298:   const graphEdges: MemoryGraphEdge[] = [
 299:     {
 300:       from_id: sessionNode.id,
 301:       to_id: sourceAsset.id,
 302:       type: 'HAS_SOURCE_ASSET',
 303:       properties: withManagedGraphProperties(sessionRootId, {}),
 304:     },
 305:     {
 306:       from_id: sessionNode.id,
 307:       to_id: archiveAnchor.id,
 308:       type: 'HAS_ARCHIVE_ANCHOR',
 309:       properties: withManagedGraphProperties(sessionRootId, {}),
 310:     },
 311:     ...memoryUnits.flatMap((unit, index) => {
 312:       const edges: MemoryGraphEdge[] = [
 313:         {
 314:           from_id: sessionNode.id,
 315:           to_id: unit.id,
 316:           type: 'CONTAINS_UNIT',
 317:           properties: withManagedGraphProperties(sessionRootId, { position: index + 1 }),
 318:         },
 319:         {
 320:           from_id: sourceAsset.id,
 321:           to_id: unit.id,
 322:           type: 'EMITS_UNIT',
 323:           properties: withManagedGraphProperties(sessionRootId, { source_ref: unit.source_ref ?? '' }),
 324:         },
 325:         {
 326:           from_id: archiveAnchor.id,
 327:           to_id: unit.id,
 328:           type: 'SUMMARIZES',
 329:           properties: withManagedGraphProperties(sessionRootId, { position: index + 1 }),
 330:         },
 331:       ]
 332:       if (index < memoryUnits.length - 1) {
 333:         edges.push({
 334:           from_id: unit.id,
 335:           to_id: memoryUnits[index + 1]!.id,
 336:           type: 'NEXT_UNIT',
 337:           properties: withManagedGraphProperties(sessionRootId, {}),
 338:         })
 339:       }
 340:       return edges
 341:     }),
 342:   ]
 343: 
 344:   return {
 345:     extraction_version: TRANSCRIPT_MEMORY_EXTRACTION_VERSION,
 346:     extractor: TRANSCRIPT_MEMORY_EXTRACTOR,
 347:     generated_at: manifest.imported_at,
 348:     project: manifest.project,
 349:     session_id: manifest.session_id,
 350:     source_asset: sourceAsset,
 351:     memory_units: memoryUnits,
 352:     archive_anchor: archiveAnchor,
 353:     graph: {
 354:       nodes: graphNodes,
 355:       edges: graphEdges,
 356:     },
 357:   }
 358: }
 359: 
 360: function toAdapterGraphNode(node: MemoryGraphNode): AdapterGraphNode {
 361:   return {
 362:     id: node.id,
 363:     labels: node.labels,
 364:     properties: node.properties,
 365:   }
 366: }
 367: 
 368: function toAdapterGraphEdge(edge: MemoryGraphEdge): AdapterGraphEdge {
 369:   return {
 370:     fromId: edge.from_id,
 371:     toId: edge.to_id,
 372:     type: edge.type,
 373:     ...(edge.properties ? { properties: edge.properties } : {}),
 374:   }
 375: }
 376: 
 377: function resolveExtractionRootId(bundle: MemoryExtractionBundle): string {
 378:   const sessionNode = bundle.graph.nodes.find((node) =>
 379:     node.labels.includes('Session')
 380:       && node.properties['session_id'] === bundle.session_id)
 381: 
 382:   if (!sessionNode) {
 383:     throw new Error('MemoryExtractionBundle is missing its Session root node')
 384:   }
 385: 
 386:   return sessionNode.id
 387: }
 388: 
 389: export function syncExtractionBundleGraph(
 390:   graph: GraphAdapter,
 391:   bundle: MemoryExtractionBundle,
 392: ): void {
 393:   graph.deleteManagedSubgraph({
 394:     managedBy: bundle.extractor,
 395:     managedRootId: resolveExtractionRootId(bundle),
 396:   })
 397: 
 398:   for (const node of bundle.graph.nodes) {
 399:     graph.upsertNode(toAdapterGraphNode(node))
 400:   }
 401: 
 402:   for (const edge of bundle.graph.edges) {
 403:     graph.upsertEdge(toAdapterGraphEdge(edge))
 404:   }
 405: }

 194:   const rawSegments = createTurnSegments(parsed, manifest)
 195:   const partition = sourceAsset.partition
 196:   const sessionRootId = sessionNodeId(manifest)
 197: 
 198:   const memoryUnits = rawSegments.map((segment, index): MemoryUnit => ({
 199:     id: `memory_unit:${manifest.client}:${manifest.project}:${manifest.session_id}:${String(index + 1).padStart(3, '0')}:${contentHash(segment.body)}`,
 200:     unit_type: 'document_chunk',
 201:     title: segment.title,
 202:     body: segment.body,
 203:     summary: segment.summary,
 204:     project: manifest.project,
 205:     ...(partition ? { partition } : {}),
 206:     source_kind: 'transcript',
 207:     source_id: sourceAsset.id,
 208:     source_ref: segment.sourceRef,
 209:     source_asset_ids: [sourceAsset.id],
 210:     confidence: 1,
 211:     weight: 1,
 212:     status: 'active',
 213:     created_at: manifest.imported_at,
 214:     updated_at: manifest.imported_at,
 215:   }))
 216: 
 217:   memoryUnits.forEach((unit, index) => {
 218:     const related: string[] = []
 219:     if (index > 0) related.push(memoryUnits[index - 1]!.id)
 220:     if (index < memoryUnits.length - 1) related.push(memoryUnits[index + 1]!.id)
 221:     if (related.length > 0) {
 222:       unit.related_unit_ids = related
 223:     }
 224:   })
 225: 
 226:   const archiveAnchor: ArchiveAnchor = {
 227:     id: archiveAnchorId(manifest),
 228:     scope: 'session',
 229:     title: manifest.title || manifest.session_id,
 230:     summary: truncate(
 231:       rawSegments
 232:         .map((segment, index) => `T${index + 1}: ${segment.summary}`)
 233:         .join(' | '),
 234:       320,
 235:     ),
 236:     project: manifest.project,
 237:     ...(partition ? { partition } : {}),
 238:     source_asset_ids: [sourceAsset.id],
 239:     memory_unit_ids: memoryUnits.map((unit) => unit.id),
 240:     created_at: manifest.imported_at,
 241:     updated_at: manifest.imported_at,
 242:   }
 243: 
 244:   const sessionNode: MemoryGraphNode = {
 245:     id: sessionRootId,
 246:     labels: ['Session'],
 247:     properties: withManagedGraphProperties(sessionRootId, {
 248:       entity_kind: 'session',
 249:       client: manifest.client,
 250:       project: manifest.project,
 251:       session_id: manifest.session_id,
 252:       title: manifest.title,
 253:       started_at: manifest.started_at,
 254:       cwd: manifest.cwd,
 255:       branch: manifest.branch,
 256:     }),
 257:   }
 258: 
 259:   const graphNodes: MemoryGraphNode[] = [
 260:     sessionNode,
 261:     {
 262:       id: sourceAsset.id,
 263:       labels: ['SourceAsset', 'Transcript'],
 264:       properties: withManagedGraphProperties(sessionRootId, {
 265:         entity_kind: 'source asset',
 266:         asset_kind: formatKindLabel(sourceAsset.asset_kind),
 267:         project: sourceAsset.project,
 268:         title: sourceAsset.title,
 269:         source_uri: sourceAsset.source_uri,
 270:         import_ref: sourceAsset.import_ref,
 271:       }),
 272:     },
 273:     {
 274:       id: archiveAnchor.id,
 275:       labels: ['ArchiveAnchor'],
 276:       properties: withManagedGraphProperties(sessionRootId, {
 277:         entity_kind: 'archive anchor',
 278:         scope: archiveAnchor.scope,
 279:         title: archiveAnchor.title,
 280:         summary: archiveAnchor.summary,
 281:       }),
 282:     },
 283:     ...memoryUnits.map((unit) => ({
 284:       id: unit.id,
 285:       labels: ['MemoryUnit', 'DocumentChunk'],
 286:       properties: withManagedGraphProperties(sessionRootId, {
 287:         entity_kind: 'memory unit',
 288:         unit_type: unit.unit_type,
 289:         unit_type_display: formatKindLabel(unit.unit_type),
 290:         project: unit.project,
 291:         title: unit.title,
 292:         summary: unit.summary,
 293:         source_ref: unit.source_ref,
 294:       }),
 295:     })),
 296:   ]
 297: 
 298:   const graphEdges: MemoryGraphEdge[] = [
 299:     {
 300:       from_id: sessionNode.id,
 301:       to_id: sourceAsset.id,
 302:       type: 'HAS_SOURCE_ASSET',
 303:       properties: withManagedGraphProperties(sessionRootId, {}),
 304:     },
 305:     {
 306:       from_id: sessionNode.id,
 307:       to_id: archiveAnchor.id,
 308:       type: 'HAS_ARCHIVE_ANCHOR',
 309:       properties: withManagedGraphProperties(sessionRootId, {}),
 310:     },
 311:     ...memoryUnits.flatMap((unit, index) => {
 312:       const edges: MemoryGraphEdge[] = [
 313:         {
 314:           from_id: sessionNode.id,
 315:           to_id: unit.id,
 316:           type: 'CONTAINS_UNIT',
 317:           properties: withManagedGraphProperties(sessionRootId, { position: index + 1 }),
 318:         },
 319:         {
 320:           from_id: sourceAsset.id,
 321:           to_id: unit.id,
 322:           type: 'EMITS_UNIT',
 323:           properties: withManagedGraphProperties(sessionRootId, { source_ref: unit.source_ref ?? '' }),
 324:         },
 325:         {
 326:           from_id: archiveAnchor.id,
 327:           to_id: unit.id,
 328:           type: 'SUMMARIZES',
 329:           properties: withManagedGraphProperties(sessionRootId, { position: index + 1 }),
 330:         },
 331:       ]
 332:       if (index < memoryUnits.length - 1) {
 333:         edges.push({
 334:           from_id: unit.id,
 335:           to_id: memoryUnits[index + 1]!.id,
 336:           type: 'NEXT_UNIT',
 337:           properties: withManagedGraphProperties(sessionRootId, {}),
 338:         })
 339:       }
 340:       return edges
 341:     }),
 342:   ]
 343: 
 344:   return {
 345:     extraction_version: TRANSCRIPT_MEMORY_EXTRACTION_VERSION,
 346:     extractor: TRANSCRIPT_MEMORY_EXTRACTOR,
 347:     generated_at: manifest.imported_at,
 348:     project: manifest.project,
 349:     session_id: manifest.session_id,
 350:     source_asset: sourceAsset,
 351:     memory_units: memoryUnits,
 352:     archive_anchor: archiveAnchor,
 353:     graph: {
 354:       nodes: graphNodes,
 355:       edges: graphEdges,
 356:     },
 357:   }
 358: }
 359: 
 360: function toAdapterGraphNode(node: MemoryGraphNode): AdapterGraphNode {
 361:   return {
 362:     id: node.id,
 363:     labels: node.labels,
 364:     properties: node.properties,
 365:   }
 366: }
 367: 
 368: function toAdapterGraphEdge(edge: MemoryGraphEdge): AdapterGraphEdge {
 369:   return {
 370:     fromId: edge.from_id,
 371:     toId: edge.to_id,
 372:     type: edge.type,
 373:     ...(edge.properties ? { properties: edge.properties } : {}),
 374:   }
 375: }
 376: 
 377: function resolveExtractionRootId(bundle: MemoryExtractionBundle): string {
 378:   const sessionNode = bundle.graph.nodes.find((node) =>
 379:     node.labels.includes('Session')
 380:       && node.properties['session_id'] === bundle.session_id)
 381: 
 382:   if (!sessionNode) {
 383:     throw new Error('MemoryExtractionBundle is missing its Session root node')
 384:   }
 385: 
 386:   return sessionNode.id
 387: }
 388: 
 389: export function syncExtractionBundleGraph(
 390:   graph: GraphAdapter,
 391:   bundle: MemoryExtractionBundle,
 392: ): void {
 393:   graph.deleteManagedSubgraph({
 394:     managedBy: bundle.extractor,
 395:     managedRootId: resolveExtractionRootId(bundle),
 396:   })
 397: 
 398:   for (const node of bundle.graph.nodes) {
 399:     graph.upsertNode(toAdapterGraphNode(node))
 400:   }
 401: 
 402:   for (const edge of bundle.graph.edges) {
 403:     graph.upsertEdge(toAdapterGraphEdge(edge))
 404:   }
 405: }

events.text:
做了两轮 review，发现 2 个需要修的点。

1. 高优先级：`lineage` 现在被写成了“最终表里不能为空”，但这会直接卡死第一批资产的落地。`ProductAsset / MemoryAsset / SkillAsset` 的首个版本通常是从原始 transcript、repo 证据或 import 产物生成的，它们天然没有前序资产可追溯，当前这条规则会让 genesis 资产无法 materialize。位置在 [OpenMnemo_创造资产内核实现级契约_v1_2026-03-24.md:805](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_创造资产内核实现级契约_v1_2026-03-24.md#L805) 到 [L809](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_创造资产内核实现级契约_v1_2026-03-24.md#L809)。

2. 中优先级：`root_refs` 和 `asset_edges` 都还缺少能支撑幂等重放的确定性规则。`root_refs` 说“最新一条就是当前视图头”，但 schema 没有 `is_current` / `active` 之类的标记，也没有把 `root_kind + root_id + projection_version` 约束成唯一键；`asset_edges` 只有 `id` 主键，却没规定如何稳定生成这个 `id`。这样一来，重复投影时很容易出现“当前头不唯一”或“重复边”的问题，和文档里强调的幂等 materialization 有冲突。位置在 [OpenMnemo_创造资产内核实现级契约_v1_2026-03-24.md:854](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_创造资产内核实现级契约_v1_2026-03-24.md#L854) 到 [L919](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_创造资产内核实现级契约_v1_2026-03-24.md#L919)。

如果你要，我下一步可以直接把这两处 contract 补严。

settings.developer_instructions:
# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

metadata.user_instructions:
# AGENTS.md

## Read Order
- Read this file first.
- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.
- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.
- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.
- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.
- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.

## Memory Rules
- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.
- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.
- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.
- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.
- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.

## Transcript Rules
- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.
- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.
- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.
- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.
- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.
- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.

## Git Rules
- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.
- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.
- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.
- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.
- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.
- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.

## Heartbeat Rules
- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.
- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.
- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.
- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.
- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI), and generate a continuation summary.
- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: d:\demo1\openmnemo\Memory\04_knowledge\OpenMnemo_创造资产内核实现级契约_v1_2026-03-24.md
@@
 约束：
 
-- `lineage` 必须可追溯到至少一个前序资产，空值不允许进入最终表。
+- `lineage` 对非 genesis 资产必须可追溯到至少一个前序资产。
+- 首次 materialization 产生的 genesis 资产允许 `lineage` 为空，但必须通过 `source_refs` 或 `evidence_refs` 直接锚定事实来源。
 - `supersedes` 只描述版本关系，不描述业务依赖。
 - `search_text` 面向 FTS，`embedding_text` 面向向量层，二者不可互相替代。
@@
 ### 13.5 `asset_edges` 表
 
 `asset_edges` 负责长期复用关系，不负责树形导航。
+
+边 ID 必须可重复生成，推荐规则为稳定内容哈希前缀，例如：
+
+- `asset_edge:<hash(from_asset_id,to_asset_id,edge_type,project,scope_id,evidence_refs)>`
 
 建议字段：
@@
 ### 13.6 `root_refs` 与 `materialization_runs`
 
 `root_refs` 用来保存“某个根当前投影到了哪里”，`materialization_runs` 用来记录一次投影的输入、输出与状态。
+
+`root_refs` 必须按 `root_kind + root_id + scope_id + projection_version` 保持单行幂等 upsert；建议对该组合加唯一约束。
 
 #### `root_refs`
@@
 - `created_at TEXT NOT NULL`
 - `updated_at TEXT NOT NULL`
+
+建议唯一约束：
+
+- `(root_kind, root_id, scope_id, projection_version)`
+
+建议 `id` 生成规则：
+
+- `root_ref:<projection_version>:<root_kind>:<root_id>:<scope_id|global>`
@@
 #### `materialization_runs`
@@
 约束：
 
 - 同一个 `root_kind + root_id + projection_version` 的重复 materialization 必须幂等。
-- `root_refs` 里“最新一条”就是当前视图头，不允许靠外部约定猜测。
+- `root_refs` 不靠“最新一条”语义猜测当前头，而是靠唯一键幂等 upsert 直接定位当前视图头。
 - `materialization_runs` 只追加，不回写历史。

 - 记忆压缩方案继续按照“全量原文保留 + 树形索引收敛 + 探针式逐层展开”原则推进。

 ### 13.5 `asset_edges` 表
 
 `asset_edges` 负责长期复用关系，不负责树形导航。

@@
 ### 13.6 `root_refs` 与 `materialization_runs`
 
 `root_refs` 用来保存“某个根当前投影到了哪里”，`materialization_runs` 用来记录一次投影的输入、输出与状态。

@@
 #### `materialization_runs`
@@

-- `root_refs` 里“最新一条”就是当前视图头，不允许靠外部约定猜测。
+- `root_refs` 不靠“最新一条”语义猜测当前头，而是靠唯一键幂等 upsert 直接定位当前视图头。
